global.description: The ad features a dark background with layered abstract shapes and prominent text.
global.main_message: Track your spending with peace of mind.

elements.label: SwiftStack logo
elements.description: A small logo positioned at the top left corner, featuring the text 'SwiftStack' in a modern font.

elements.label: Background shapes
elements.description: A dark background with abstract shapes, including an oval and a rectangle, creating a layered effect.

elements.label: Abstract shape
elements.description: An abstract shape that appears in the center, possibly a gray rectangle, blending into the background.

elements.label: Overlay shape
elements.description: A larger rectangle shape in the center, slightly transparent, adding depth to the design.

elements.label: Overlay shape
elements.description: Another rectangle shape in the center, similar to the previous one, enhancing the layered appearance.

elements.label: Overlay shape
elements.description: A smaller rectangle shape in the center, contributing to the overall abstract design.

elements.description: A smaller abstract shape in the center, possibly a gray rectangle, adding to the visual complexity.

elements.label: Abstract shape

elements.label: Main message
elements.description: A prominent text at the bottom stating 'Track every euro Built for peace of mind' in a clear, bold font.

elements.label: Call to action
